readings.Aries: Something is beginning. You felt it before you understood it. Don't wait for the signal — you are the signal. Let this one be easy.
readings.Taurus: The routine that holds you together is also the routine that holds you in place. Notice which is happening now. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Gemini: The duality you experience is not a disorder — it's wide bandwidth. Channel it deliberately. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Cancer: Something you offered freely is being taken for granted. You noticed. Say something. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Leo: You've been playing it safe in a context that rewards exactly the kind of risk you're capable of. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Virgo: The thing you've been editing is ready. Publishing it is the harder work and it's time. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Libra: Someone is asking you to take their side. You are stalling. At some point stalling is a choice. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Scorpio: You do not give second chances easily. In this case, one more data point might be warranted. Let this one be easy.
readings.Sagittarius: Your honesty is a gift. Right now it needs better packaging. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Capricorn: Your self-sufficiency is extraordinary and occasionally lonely. Let someone contribute. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Aquarius: The freedom you've designed for yourself has some unexpected furniture in it. Examine what you chose. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Pisces: The sacrifice you made was real and it was meaningful and it is done. You don't have to keep paying. Sleep on it before committing.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You make each other more — more energised, more expansive, occasionally more than either of you can contain.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You make each other more — more energised, more expansive, occasionally more than either of you can contain.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
